$schema.description: URI of the JSON schema describing this file.

release.description: Configuration for the bv release workflow.

branches.description: Regular expressions (matched against the short branch name) identifying branches that produce public releases.

generateDocsFrom.description: Regular expressions (matched against the short branch name) identifying branches that documentation is generated from.

configuration.description: Build configuration used to produce release artifacts. Defaults to dotnet.configuration when omitted.

checkPublicApi.description: Whether public API files are checked before a release.

changelogUpdates.description: Which releases require a changelog update.

emptyChangelog.description: Text substituted when a release has no changelog entries. When omitted, an empty changelog fails the release.

dogfood.description: Whether self-references are updated (dogfooding) during a release.

prereleaseTag.description: Prerelease tag applied to prerelease versions. When omitted, prerelease versions are not allowed.

assemblyVersionPrecision.description: How many version components are carried into the assembly version.

dotnet.description: Configuration for invocations of the dotnet CLI.

all.description: Invocation configuration common to all `dotnet` commands.

env.description: Environment variables forwarded to `dotnet`, keyed by variable name.

restore.description: Invocation configuration for the `dotnet restore` command.

env.description: Environment variables forwarded to `dotnet`, keyed by variable name.

build.description: Invocation configuration for the `dotnet build` command.

env.description: Environment variables forwarded to `dotnet`, keyed by variable name.

test.description: Invocation configuration for the `dotnet test` command.

env.description: Environment variables forwarded to `dotnet`, keyed by variable name.

pack.description: Invocation configuration for the `dotnet pack` command.

env.description: Environment variables forwarded to `dotnet`, keyed by variable name.

nugetPush.description: Invocation configuration for the `dotnet nuget push` command.

env.description: Environment variables forwarded to `dotnet`, keyed by variable name.

feeds.description: Push feeds, keyed by channel name (prerelease, release).

source.description: Source URL of the NuGet feed.

apiKeyEnv.description: Name of the environment variable that holds the feed API key.

source.description: Source URL of the NuGet feed.

apiKeyEnv.description: Name of the environment variable that holds the feed API key.

tokenEnv.description: Name of the environment variable that holds the GitHub access token.

identity.description: Git identity used by automated commits.

name.description: Display name used as the Git author/committer.

email.description: Email address used as the Git author/committer.
